name: ERC-8183 Courthouse
description: Multi-agent job marketplace built on the Agentic Commerce Protocol (ERC-8183). Three autonomous agents — Client, Provider, and Evaluator — coordinate through on-chain USDC escrow to post, execute, judge, and pay for work. Includes a ReputationHook that tracks provider performance.
author: Omniacs DAO

AgenticCommerce.description: ERC-8183 reference implementation with USDC escrow, configurable fees, and hook support

ReputationHook.description: IACPHook implementation that tracks provider reputation (completed, rejected, score 0-100)

agents.name: Client Agent
agents.role: Posts jobs with descriptions and budgets, funds escrow, monitors completion

agents.name: Provider Agent
agents.role: Discovers open jobs, executes work via x402 services, submits deliverable hashes

agents.name: Evaluator Agent
agents.role: Reviews deliverables, runs quality checks, approves or rejects with reason hashes

capabilities: Create and fund jobs via ERC-8183 escrow
Discover and claim open jobs autonomously
Execute work using x402 services (LLM, proxy, pastebin)
Evaluate deliverable quality with heuristic scoring
Distribute payment with platform and evaluator fees
